Title: Primary Company Prefix Length
Description: Variable Length Indicator for the Primary Company Prefix.

Title: Primary Company Prefix
Description: Primary GS1 Company Prefix (GCP): As verified by the GS1 US. Also, the funder of this promotion (i.e. responsible for reimbursing retailer).

Title: Offer Code
Description: The specific offer code assigned by the manufacturer

Title: Save Value Length
Description: Variable Length Indicator for the Save Value.

Title: Save Value
Description: Amount of discount (cents off, free, or percent off). Depends on Save Value Code.

Title: Primary Purchase Requirement Length
Description: Variable Length Indicator for the Primary Purchase Requirement.

Title: Primary Purchase Requirement
Description: The specific amount required to be purchased, based on the Purchase Requirement Code (e.g. number of units, value, weight).

Title: Primary Purchase Requirement Code
Description: Indicates what the Purchase Requirement means (Number of Units, Value, Weight).

Title: Primary Purchase Family Code
Description: Triple zero super summary (000), 992 Bypass, or 3-digit code as assigned by Mfr. 992 is often used to bypass specific item validation if it applies to any item by the manufacturer.

Title: Data Field 0
Description: Used as a spacer or separator for additional fields.

Title: 2nd Additional Purchase Rules Code
Description: Save Value Rules logic. e.g. Primary Item OR Second Item, Primary Item AND Second Item.

Title: 2nd Purchase Requirement Length
Description: Variable Length Indicator for the 2nd Purchase Requirement.

Title: 2nd Purchase Requirement
Description: The specific amount required to be purchased for the 2nd item group, based on the Purchase Requirement Code (e.g. number of units, value, weight).

Title: 2nd Purchase Requirement Code
Description: Indicates what the 2nd Purchase Requirement means (Number of Units, Value, Weight).

Title: 2nd Purchase Family Code
Description: Triple zero super summary or 3-digit code as assigned by Mfr for the second purchase requirement.

Title: 2nd Purchase Company Prefix Length
Description: Variable Length Indicator for the 2nd Purchase Company Prefix.

Title: 2nd Purchase Company Prefix
Description: Second GS1 Company Prefix (GCP): Optional company prefix for the second purchase requirement.

Title: 3rd Purchase Requirement Length
Description: Variable Length Indicator for the 3rd Purchase Requirement.

Title: 3rd Purchase Requirement
Description: The specific amount required to be purchased for the 3rd item group, based on the Purchase Requirement Code (e.g. number of units, value, weight).

Title: 3rd Purchase Requirement Code
Description: Indicates what the 3rd Purchase Requirement means (Number of Units, Value, Weight).

Title: 3rd Purchase Family Code
Description: Triple zero super summary or 3-digit code as assigned by Mfr for the third purchase requirement.

Title: 3rd Purchase Company Prefix Length
Description: Variable Length Indicator for the 3rd Purchase Company Prefix.

Title: 3rd Purchase Company Prefix
Description: Third GS1 Company Prefix (GCP): Optional company prefix for the third purchase requirement.

Title: Expiration Date
Description: As printed on the coupon. Format: YYMMDD

Title: Start Date
Description: First date offer is available for use. This date MUST be printed on the coupon. Format: YYMMDD

Title: Serial Number Length
Description: Variable Length Indicator for the Serial Number.

Title: Serial Number
Description: Indicates serialization codes will be added to this DataBar. The length of that code, including check-digit, is to be specified. Length may be 6 to 15 digits.

Title: Retailer Company Prefix / GLN
Description: Allows a retailer’s GCP or GLN to be included which will limit coupon’s use to that location only.

Title: Save Value Code
Description: Determines if the save value is cents off, free item, or percent off.

Options.Label: Free Item up to maximum value

Title: Applies to Which Item
Description: Value Applies to: Points discount to one of the GCP/family codes listed. NOTE: If ANY, BOTH or ANY Item Combination is selected, Primary Item should be selected in this field, as the consumer has been given options and we do not know what item will be purchased.

Title: Store Coupon
Description: ONLY used for retailer promotions that offer a discount on a product and limits the number of products that can be purchased at that discount. For example: Save .50 on 2-liter soda, limit 5. NOTE: Not to be used in manufacturer DataBars.

Title: Don't Multiply Flag
Description: Do Not Multiply Save Value: Do Not Double flag for in-store distributed coupons
